north_star: Income directory — fastest near-term revenue path for SELARIX. Two personas: resellers (need restock day + distance) and bargain hunters (need cheapest day + distance).

Commits: removed broken jigsaw map, fixed wrong-state in About sentence (44 stores affected), replaced generic tips with /guide link, fixed featured=0 stray render, fixed JSON-LD schema state.

Commits: rendered hours from hours_json (491/522 listings now show hours + Open/Closed badge), embedded Google Map iframe (522/522 listings get map, no API key), defensive rating display (25/522 with NULL rating now hide stars cleanly).

Email infrastructure verified — 6 mailboxes + forwarders + Web3Forms delivery flow documented.
